name: player_season_projected_pass_yds honors the sourceid param (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with distinct AVERAGE (111.1) and ESPN (222.2) 2024 season passing-yards projections in projections_index, then request the column twice in one view: once with no sourceid (defaults to AVERAGE) and once with sourceid=3 (ESPN). The two output columns must return 111.1 and 222.2 respectively, proving (a) the param selects the source and (b) sourceid is part of the table alias so the two same-id columns do not collapse into a single shared join.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."passing_yards" AS "season_projected_pass_yds_0", "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."passing_yards" AS "season_projected_pass_yds_1", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "projections_index" as "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4" on "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."season_year" = 2024 and "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."week" = '0' and "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."sourceid" = 18 and "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."season_type" = 'REG' left join "projections_index" as "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c" on "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."season_year" = 2024 and "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."week" = '0' and "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."sourceid" = 3 and "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."season_type" = 'REG' where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "tc468a171bbab2e1056f28c5c180966f4"."passing_yards", "t01a366a483bf86598f990c1943fee20c"."passing_yards", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-000915', 'Test', 'Proj', 'T.Proj', 'Test Proj', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)
INSERT INTO projections_index (pid, sourceid, week, season_year, season_type, passing_yards) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-000915', 18, 0, 2024, 'REG', 111.1)
INSERT INTO projections_index (pid, sourceid, week, season_year, season_type, passing_yards) VALUES ('TEST-PROJ-000915', 3, 0, 2024, 'REG', 222.2)
